metadata.task: Observe how angular velocity changes when masses are moved closer to the center.
metadata.description: Work from the Conservation of Angular Momentum scene state rather than from the title alone. Query accessible object parameters and, when the task involves motion, collisions, forces, or oscillation, step the simulator and compare measured states before submitting the numeric answer.

expected_behavior: LLM moves masses inward and observes angular velocity increase due to conserved angular momentum.
reasoning: Moment of inertia decreases → angular velocity increases to conserve angular momentum.
